# Semi Filters — llms.txt
# This file helps AI assistants (ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, Copilot) understand this website.
# Learn more: https://llmstxt.org/

# Business Overview
Semi Filters is an e-commerce store specializing in OEM-quality filtration products for semi trucks (18-wheelers, heavy-duty trucks). Founded by trucking industry veterans and based in Sanford, Florida, USA. Serving owner-operators and fleets across the United States.

# Products
- Oil Filters for semi trucks (Freightliner, Peterbilt, Kenworth, Volvo, Mack, International)
- Air Filters (engine air filters for diesel semi trucks)
- Fuel Filters (diesel fuel filters for commercial trucks)
- Cabin Air Filters (HVAC filters for semi truck cabs)
All filters meet or exceed OEM specifications. Prices competitive with fair market rates.

# Key Facts
- 5+ years in business
- 50,000+ filters sold
- 10,000+ satisfied customers
- 99% customer satisfaction rate
- Same-day shipping available
- Free shipping on orders over $150
- Ships to all 50 US states and Canada

# Contact & Location
- Website: https://semifilters.com

- Business hours: Mon–Fri 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST, Sat 8:00 AM – 2:00 PM CST

- Shop all filters: https://semifilters.com/shop

# Policies
- 100% satisfaction guarantee on every product
- Volume discounts available for fleets (contact for custom quote)
- Returns and warranty support available

# Target Customers
- Owner-operators of semi trucks
- Fleet managers and fleet maintenance teams
- Diesel mechanics and truck shops
- Anyone maintaining Freightliner, Peterbilt, Kenworth, Volvo, Mack, or International trucks
